name: Safety Inspector
text:
You may spend 3 XP as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, each player must kill one of their units. If you paid my additional cost, you don't kill a unit this way.

accessibility_text:

legality.notes: No specific Standard Constructed ban found in official first-bans announcement as of 2026-03-30.
